# IEEE Andrew S. Grove Award

[Home](https://corporate-awards.ieee.org/) · [Awards](https://corporate-awards.ieee.org/award/) · **IEEE Andrew S. Grove Award**

###### Sponsor(s)

###### Presented to

An individual or multiple recipients up to three in number

###### Scope

For outstanding contributions to solid-state devices and technology

###### Prize

The award consists of a bronze medal, certificate, and honorarium.

###### Basis for judging
In the evaluation process, the following criteria are considered: field leadership, contribution, originality, breadth, inventive value, publications, other achievements; society activities, honors, duration, and the quality of the nomination.

###### [View Award Recipients](https://corporate-awards.ieee.org/wp-content/uploads/grove-rl.pdf)

### About IEEE Awards Board

results.title: Appliances at Nonn's in Madison, WI and New Berlin, WI
excerpts:
A streamlined look and next generation features blend with today’s kitchens and make everyday routines incredibly simple. See what’s possible when brilliant touches answer real-life needs.

### Make Your Head Spin

**Whirlpool: Designs its appliances with your experience in mind.**

Through rigorous innovation, Whirlpool strives to make everyday activities effortless with cutting edge appliances at reasonable prices. Give your home a sleek, refined look for less.

### History in the Baking

**KitchenAid: Blossomed from its iconic 1919 Stand Mixer into a well known line of appliances.**

As the only appliance brand exclusively dedicated to kitchen products, KitchenAid guarantees quality craftsmanship, versatile and customized technology, durability and a timeless aesthetic.

### Calm, Cool, Collected

**Frigidaire Appliances: Saves you time so you can spend it elsewhere.**

The company has designed over 750 easy-to-use tools based on real customer needs and real customer budgets.
### Pure Power

**Electrolux: Aspires to perfection though performance.  
**

Electrolux customers agree that the brand offers unique quality in its powerful products. Learn how your kitchen and routine can benefit from appliances with advanced technology.

### Convenient Luxury

**Subzero Wolf: Paves the way for premier kitchen products.  
**

Combining industry expertise and a wide variety of high-end appliances to suit any refrigeration and cooking need, Subzero Wolf is the ultimate choice for sophisticated cooking and cooling products. What’s more, Nonn’s will help you install them!

### Looking for **more?**

Want to dig a little deeper? At Nonn’s we carry a wide range of appliance brands, styles and selections. From refrigerators and ovens to washers and dryers, we’ve got an appliance for every application.

[](https://www.nonnsappliances.com/)

### What Our **Customers** Say
“Mary Kay at Nonn’s was professional, kind, and took an interest in the types of details I was looking for in a full home of appliances. She consistently and swiftly returned my calls and emails. She provides good old-fashioned “customer-comes-first” service.”

#### Karyl K.

_2025 Home Appliances Customer_

“The service tech Derrek, OUTSTANDING! Works very PROFESSIONAL and NEAT! I will recommend NONN’S to EVERYONE! Great installer and service. Thank you Mary Kay!”

#### Mary & Bill F.

_2025 Customer_

“Many thanks for your excellent service. We are thrilled with our new GE washer and dryer – they’re exactly what I had in mind when we stopped by Nonn’s last week to check out your appliances. Your expert advice was very helpful, and the delivery and installation of the washer and dryer on Tuesday could not have gone better. The delivery crew was knowledgeable, considerate, and efficient.”

#### Madge K.

_2024 Customer_

results.title: Generation of Acoustic Signals by Pulsed ... - IEEE Xplore
excerpts: Abstract: A discussion of the production of sound when short microwave pulses are directed at an absorber is presented. Possible mechanisms of the phenomenon are presented. These mechanisms may be important for a better understanding of the so-called microwave "hearing" effect.

results.title: Generation of Acoustic Signals by Pulsed Microwave Energy ...
